title: Listening Minutes by Genre

landmines.name: ms-vs-seconds-unit
landmines.kills: Dividing ms_played by 60 (treating milliseconds as seconds) overstates minutes 1000x; minutes are ms_played / 60000.

landmines.name: null-genre-dropped
landmines.kills: Filtering genre IS NOT NULL silently deletes the uncategorized catalog; NULL genre must surface as its own labelled bucket.

landmines.name: null-ms-as-zero
landmines.kills: SUM ignores NULL ms_played by design; treating NULL as 0 is harmless for the sum but the solver must not extend that habit elsewhere.

notes: Verified identical on sqlite, duckdb, postgres; standard SQL also runs on mysql. mssql omitted for consistency with the date/LIMIT-dependent problems in this universe.
